home_team.name: USA
home_team.trivia: This is the first time the USA has reached the World Cup Quarter-Finals on home soil since 1994.

roster.name: Matt Turner
roster.fact: Known as the Penalty Stopper; has saved 4 crucial penalties in national team colors.

roster.name: Sergiño Dest
roster.fact: Famous for his attacking runs and incredible ball-dribbling skills as a right-back.

roster.name: Antonee Robinson
roster.fact: Nicknamed 'Jedi' due to his lifelong love for Star Wars; fastest sprinter in the squad.

roster.name: Tyler Adams
roster.fact: The heartbeat of the midfield; captained the team at Qatar 2022 at just 23 years old.

roster.name: Weston McKennie
roster.fact: Celebrates goals with a Harry Potter 'wand cast' gesture; loves ranch dressing.

roster.name: Christian Pulisic
roster.fact: Nicknamed 'Captain America'; scored the tournament's fastest goal in the 3rd minute of the Group Stage.

roster.name: Brenden Aaronson
roster.fact: Nicknamed the 'Medford Messi' because of his tireless work rate and agile pressing.

roster.name: Folarin Balogun
roster.fact: Born in New York, raised in London; selected the USA over England and Nigeria.

away_team.name: Mexico
away_team.trivia: Mexico is competing in their record-tying 18th World Cup tournament, seeking their first ever semi-final berth.

roster.name: Luis Malagón
roster.fact: Known for his athletic reflexes; succeeded legend Guillermo Ochoa as Mexico's No. 1.

roster.name: César Montes
roster.fact: Towering center-back nicknamed 'El Cachorro' (The Pup); scored a famous overhead kick in domestic league.

roster.name: Edson Álvarez
roster.fact: Nicknamed 'El Machín'; captain of the national team, known for defensive dominance.

roster.name: Uriel Antuna
roster.fact: Extremely fast winger who once clocked a top speed of 35.7 km/h during a match.

roster.name: Santiago Giménez
roster.fact: Nicknamed 'El Bebote'; born in Argentina but naturalized Mexican; Feyenoord's top scorer.

roster.name: Hirving Lozano
roster.fact: World-famous 'Chucky'; scored the winning goal against Germany in the World Cup 2018.
